details.test: Task 1: Add 16GB business laptop under 1200 to cart (qty 2)
Task 2: Submit CRM integration quote request
Task 3: Schedule on-site hardware maintenance visit
Task 4: Select cheapest IT support plan with 24/7 and on-site visits
Task 5: Save KB article on ProRack Server X200 overheating and reopen
Task 6: Add 3 accessories under 50 with 4+ stars and free shipping, apply SAVE10
Task 7: Register for cloud migration training (1 seat, intermediate, ET)
Task 8: Configure custom rack server 3k-4k with 3-year maintenance and request quote
